facts_promoted.fact: Management fees to DBI: $113.5M (2024) — calculated weekly based on retail sales
Deferred revenue growth: $168.9M (2024) from $98.5M (2022) — 72% increase in 2 years
Franchise rights valued at $1.95B gross ($1.67B net, 29-year useful life)
Securitization notes: 7 tranches ranging from 2.05% to 4.35% fixed + 2 variable funding facilities
Debt maturity: $888.5M due in 2026, $755.5M in 2027 — significant near-term refinancing needs
Net lease income: Company earns $47.8M more from subleases than it pays in lease costs
No employees — all management services provided by DBI under management agreement
$665M note receivable from affiliate (Sep 2024), due no later than Aug 2029
No subsequent events requiring disclosure or adjustment (evaluated through Mar 20, 2025)
No-waiver/no-disclaimer provision embedded directly in FA Section 16.I for 14 states
Remodel required at 10 years; refurbishment at 5 and 15 years — at franchisee cost
Indemnification survives termination; unlimited (not limited by insurance amount)
Franchisor may enter restaurant without trespass liability for health/safety concerns
